active_bets.title: When will OpenAI IPO? — Before Mar 1, 2027
active_bets.thesis: Resolves YES if OpenAI IPOs before Mar 1, 2027. active_bets.title: Will the total vote count for all participants in Pennsylvania 10 House General Election be above 340000? — Above 340K
active_bets.thesis: Resolves YES if total votes in the PA-10 House general election exceed 340,000. active_bets.title: Will 2 Chainz release a new album in 2026?
active_bets.thesis: Resolves YES if 2 Chainz releases a new album in 2026. He is a prolific, active artist who has put out albums/projects at roughly a yearly cadence for over a decade. For an active rapper, P(a new album in a given calendar year) is high. Slight YES over the 0.50.

history.title: Will the **high temp in Austin** be 96-97° on Jul 18, 2026? — 96° to 97°
history.thesis: Austin forecast 94F with a slight warming trend into the weekend (95F next two days). The 96-97 band is 2-3F above forecast; the warming trend gives it modest upside over a flat error model.

history.title: Will the **high temp in Austin** be >97° on Jul 18, 2026? — 98° or above
history.thesis: Austin Bergstrom forecast high Jul 18 is 94F under a stable summer pattern (adjacent days 95F). The >97 (>=98) market needs +4F above a reliable, stable forecast — a low-probability warm tail.

history.title: Will the high temp in Chicago be <89° on Jul 18, 2026? — 88° or below
history.thesis: Chicago Midway forecast high Jul 18 is 90F but with 'Chance Showers and Thunderstorms' and a front passing (next-day high collapses to 80F). Frontal timing/convection adds strong downside risk to the high, so max <=88 (this T89 under-market) is a live ~1-in-3 outcome — the value

history.title: Will the **high temp in LA** be >79° on Jul 18, 2026? — 80° or above
history.thesis: LAX forecast 77F; the >79 (>=80) market needs +3F above a marine-capped forecast — a low-probability warm tail for a coastal station.

history.title: Will the **high temp in LA** be 78-79° on Jul 18, 2026? — 78° to 79°
history.thesis: LAX forecast 77F; the 78-79 band is 1-2F above forecast — possible on an early fog burn-off but against the marine cap.

history.title: Will the **high temp in LA** be 76-77° on Jul 18, 2026? — 76° to 77°
history.thesis: LAX NWS same-day forecast high Jul 18 is 77F under a marine-layer/fog pattern ('Patchy Fog then Partly Sunny'). Coastal SoCal summer highs are extremely predictable (marine cap), so the 76-77 on-forecast band carries unusually high probability — tight distribution, low variance.

history.title: Will the **high temp in Denver** be 95-96° on Jul 18, 2026? — 95° to 96°
history.thesis: Denver forecast 93F with a sharp warming trend (next-day high 97F, Sunny). The 95-96 band is 2-3F above forecast; the incoming ridge gives the warm side modest upside over a flat error model.

history.title: Will the **high temp in Denver** be 91-92° on Jul 18, 2026? — 91° to 92°
history.thesis: Denver forecast 93F; the 91-92 band is 1-2F below forecast — plausible cool near-miss.

history.title: Will the **high temp in Denver** be 93-94° on Jul 18, 2026? — 93° to 94°
history.thesis: Denver Intl NWS same-day forecast high Jul 18 is 93F, Sunny. The 93-94 band is on the forecast center — modal outcome under clear skies (high insolation, reliable).

history.title: Will the **high temp in Philadelphia** be 84-85° on Jul 18, 2026? — 84° to 85°
history.thesis: Philadelphia forecast 88F; the 84-85 band is 3-4F below forecast — a meaningful miss required. Smoke helps the under-case but 4F below a same-day forecast is a ~1.5 sigma event.

history.title: Will the **high temp in Philadelphia** be 86-87° on Jul 18, 2026? — 86° to 87°
history.thesis: NWS forecast high for Philadelphia Intl Jul 18 is 88F with smoke. The 86-87 band is 1-2F below forecast; smoke suppression could pull the realized high down toward this band, giving it modest upside vs a naive symmetric error model.

history.title: Will the **high temp in Denver** be 92-93° on Jul 17, 2026? — 92° to 93°
history.thesis: 92-93 contains Denver's 93F NWS forecast, so it is the modal band from the forecast alone.

milestones.title: M1 — Honest data at scale (current)
milestones.body: Mass exploration bets flowing daily with trustworthy measurement: ask-price fills, robust settlement, growing calibration + category profiles. Exit: 500+ settled bets, no known measurement biases. **Path to the first sustained trading loop:** #2 + #3 (ask-price fills, so history isn't mid-priced) → #4 (assessment reliability) → #5 (settlement robustness) → #16 (first continuous ~24h session with settlements scored end-to-end). Credentials/auth (#15) done — read-only client, keychain storage.

milestones.title: M2 — Accuracy
milestones.body: Use M1 data to make predictions measurably better: prompt/threshold tuning from calibration evidence, category-aware analysis, richer scraping (per- category sources, entity dossiers), drift monitoring. Exit: conviction-tier Brier beats market baseline on a sustained window.

milestones.title: M3 — Real-money readiness
milestones.body: Everything in docs/MARKETS.md promotion criteria: 1,000+ settled bets, bootstrap-CI-positive conviction ROI after fees, out-of-sample calibration, per-category eligibility, cross-event correlation controls, minimum-stake Kalshi demo-API execution path. Exit: both humans sign off.

milestones.title: M4 — Expansion (not before M3)
milestones.body: Polymarket ingestion → cross-venue signals; second-venue trading; automated threshold tuning.

in_progress.title: brain: economics evidence adapter for the advisor (release calendar + latest prints)
auto_forecast: fix MAE→sigma conversion; then fit sigma empirically from market.db
Split exploration_min_edge: 0.00 for fast-lane markets, keep 0.02 for long-dated
Joint: Settlement.entry_price docstring now stale after ask-based fills (PR #64 finding)

upcoming.title: Polymarket read-only ingestion (M4 - do not start before M3)
Tighten entity-cap heuristic against weather-band false matches (#13 follow-up)
candidates: zoneinfo per-station timezones for the same-day filter (replace hardcoded July/DST offsets)

completed.title: task: add conviction_enabled flag in policy.decide (side:body)
Add Tier.VOID for voided/scratched Kalshi markets (refund treatment, excluded from scoring)
Longshot-bias structural signal (Brain)
Brain correctness minors: rules_check regexes, flow baseline, parse robustness (deep-review P2)
Kalshi ingestion robustness: silent 1000-event truncation, poison-pill guard, retry/backoff, dead-book filter (deep-review P2)
Backup for data/ (overturns O5) + single-writer lock for decide/settle (deep-review blockers)
Betting-math seams: fees in gate+Kelly, drawdown vs deployment, dynamic bankroll, risk-gate exploration (deep-review P1)
Brain data integrity: emit idempotency/dedup, reader hardening, atomic writes (deep-review P1)
Harden Body JSONL readers, supervisor coverage, settlement robustness (deep-review P1)
Batch settlement fetch (multi-ticker resolution polling)
Smart-flow (steam) detector: anomalous price/volume moves as evidence
Prediction-level scoring: resolve and score every emitted prediction (no bet required)
Fast-resolution candidate lane (soon-closing markets, lower volume floor)
First sustained paper-trading session (continuous /cycle, ~24h)
Kalshi authenticated client + encrypted credential storage
Cross-event correlated exposure control
Bootstrap CI + out-of-sample stats for promotion criteria
Drift monitoring on rolling Brier
Category-aware prompting + rules-ambiguity score
Entity/topic dossiers in the knowledge store
Broaden scraping: per-category data sources
Settlement robustness: finalization lag, voided markets, missing tickers
Live-test advisor/adversary JSON reliability at scale
Fill paper bets at the ask, not bid/ask mid
Add yes_bid/yes_ask to MarketSnapshot (contract v3)

open_questions.title: Q: Longshot edge is maker-only — paper fill model must represent maker vs taker fills (blocks measuring #90)
Q: Resolution-watcher latency-penalty magnitude (fill-model slippage shape)
Q: Governance — branch protection now, guarded set for paper-mode files, untrusted issue text
Q: M3 promotion arithmetic may be unmeetable + calibration design (per-category maps, bin cliffs)
Q: Dual-loop divergence — declare a canonical loop + restore structural price-blindness
